title: metteniusaceae
intro: The metteniusaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. Metteniusaceae is a small family of about 30 species, primarily found in tropical regions of the world, including Africa and Southeast Asia. Members of this family are known to be evergreen shrubs or small trees, often characterized by their unique combination of floral and foliar features. The metteniusaceae family is relatively rare and not well-studied, but its members are often valued for their distinctive foliage and ornamental value.
